collections.name: users
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_users_referral_code` ON `users` (referral_code) WHERE referral_code != ''
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_users_document_id` ON `users` (document_id) WHERE document_id != ''

collections.name: brand_kits
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_brand_kits_user ON brand_kits (user_id)

collections.name: insurance_partners
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_insurance_partners_code ON insurance_partners (partner_code)

collections.name: medical_specialties
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_medical_specialties_name ON medical_specialties (name)

collections.name: campaigns
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_campaigns_slug ON campaigns (slug)
